Zeplyn Advisor Coaching

AI-powered wealth management advisor coaching system for enhancing advisor performance and client experience through automated meeting evaluation and feedback.

Category Wealth Management
Pricing Included with Zeplyn Wealth Management OS (contact for pricing)
Released July 2026
Visit Zeplyn Advisor Coaching →

About Zeplyn Advisor Coaching

Zeplyn launched its Advisor Coaching feature on July 23, 2026, an AI-powered capability within its wealth management operating system designed to enhance advisor performance and client experience. The system automatically evaluates, scores, and provides feedback on client and prospect meetings, eliminating the need for manual call or transcript review by managers. Key features include automated meeting evaluation with customizable scoring rubrics, contextual coaching tips based on specific meeting moments, firm-wide performance reports via the 'Ask Zeplyn' feature, AI-generated client personality profiles from meeting notes and emails, role-playing and preparation tools for challenging conversations, and scalable oversight for ensuring consistent client experience across organizations. The platform integrates with leading custodians, CRMs, and financial planning tools, and is powered by Zeplyn Agent Nexus for unifying client intelligence across various systems.

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Automated meeting evaluation and feedback system
  • Customizable scoring rubrics aligned to firm standards
  • Contextual coaching tips based on specific meeting moments
  • Firm-wide performance reports via 'Ask Zeplyn' feature
  • AI-generated client personality profiles from communications
  • Role-playing and preparation tools for challenging conversations
  • Scalable oversight for consistent client experience across organizations
  • Integrates with major custodians, CRMs, and financial planning tools

❌ Cons

  • Requires subscription to Zeplyn Wealth Management OS
  • May involve learning curve for optimal feature utilization
  • Dependent on Zeplyn platform availability and performance

Best For

Wealth management firms seeking to enhance advisor performance, standardize client interactions, and gain scalable oversight of advisor-client relationships through AI-powered coaching and analytics.
